items.title_zh: 一种流行的理论是，当研究人员……时，研究论文 alpha* 和实验室出版〜就死了。
items.description: one popular theory is that research paper alpha* and lab publishing ~died when researchers realized that instead of fighting with marketing depts they could simply walk out the door and get >$100m for their legally protected tacit knowledg…
items.description_zh: 一种流行的理论是，研究论文 alpha* 和实验室出版 ~ 消亡了，因为研究人员意识到，他们不必与营销部门抗争，只需走出门，就可以通过受法律保护的隐性知识获得超过 1 亿美元的收入……

items.title: Routing to models is genuinely hard.
items.title_zh: 路由到模型确实很困难。
items.description: Routing to models is genuinely hard. It means mapping each task to the right model - which requires benchmarking models against your product's specific tasks and dialing in the quality/cost trade-off. And there is an opportunity in that di…
items.description_zh: 路由到模型确实很困难。这意味着将每个任务映射到正确的模型 - 这需要根据产品的特定任务对模型进行基准测试，并进行质量/成本权衡。这里面有一个机会……

items.title: We never said we don't upload any user data to the cloud.
items.title_zh: 我们从未说过我们不会将任何用户数据上传到云端。
items.description: We never said we don't upload any user data to the cloud. We said the code (file contents) specifically doesn't. Paxel is here to help you, and over time as local models get better, we'll be able to do even more locally. Can't wait, tbh. h…
items.description_zh: 我们从未说过我们不会将任何用户数据上传到云端。我们说过代码（文件内容）具体没有。 Paxel 随时为您提供帮助，随着时间的推移，随着本地模型变得更好，我们将能够在本地做更多的事情。等不及了，说实话。嗯…
